Shin jotting down

LU Decomposition (LU factorization)

12 Jul 2020
  1. 가우시안 소거법을 통한 역행렬 계산
 
    \begin{algorithm}
    \caption{Gaussian Elimination for Matrix Inversion}
    \begin{algorithmic}

    \INPUT $m \isin \N$, $Matrix$  $M_{ij}$
    \PROCEDURE{Forward-Substitution}{$m$}
        \FOR{$i = 1$ \TO $m - 1$}
            \STATE Scale row to get pivot $1$
            \FOR{$j = i + 1$ \TO $m$}
                \STATE subtract multiple of row $\vec{i}$ from row $\vec{j}$ to zero out pivot column
            \ENDFOR
        \ENDFOR
    \ENDPROCEDURE
    \PROCEDURE{Backward-Substitution}{$m$}
        \FOR{$i = m$ \TO $2$}  
            \FOR{$j = i - 1$ \TO $1$}
                \STATE zero out rest of column
            \ENDFOR
        \ENDFOR
    \ENDPROCEDURE
    \end{algorithmic}
    \end{algorithm}

Gaussian Elimination’s Total Running Time

\(O(n^3)\)

\(A = LU\)

선형계를 풀거나 역행렬을 구할 때 사용
